description: Task instructions are progressively displayed on a dark overlay, explaining the scenario of planning a holiday to London from the Sunshine Coast.

description: User types their initial thoughts into the prompt field: 'I can. Imagine you're living on the Sunshine Coast in Queensland and you're planning'.
